benefits_tech_systems.vendor_name: West Publishing Corporation (a Thomson Reuters business)
use_cases: Identity-risk analytics over SNAP recipient population (heads of household) for fraud/identity-verification flagging
Aggregate risk dashboards displaying applicants binned high/medium/low risk
Configured anomaly alerts (shared home address, IP address, email address, deceased recipients)
contract_or_order_ids: West Publishing SOW for IDRA (companion to Order Q-08237974)
benefits_tech_systems.pricing_terms: Year 1 total $327,180: IDRA Subscription (up to 30 users, incl. CLEAR ID Confirm for up to 500,000 program participants/year) $214,980; one-time batch of ID Risk Analytics for current population (~1.02M recipients) with SIU Briefing Report and supporting identity-risk details $112,200. Years 2 and 3 annual subscription increases 5% year over year. Additional recipients above the threshold: $0.20/recipient.
benefits_tech_systems.batch_or_match_limits: One-time batch of CIDC data: up to 1,020,000 recipients (then-current SNAP population). Ongoing Recipient Validation: up to 500,000 matches per year. Risk Alerts: up to 30 configured alerts.
required_data_inputs: One year of program data relating to applicants, recipients, and households (delivered within 30 days of contract start)
Reference descriptions for all reference codes in the data
Data dictionaries for all the data delivered to TR
Diagram of the relational model (primary/foreign key relations among source tables)
named_deliverables: One-time batch ID Risk Analytics output for current existing SNAP population, plus a Summary Briefing Report (Special Investigations Unit) with supporting identity-risk details and a review session
Master Design Document (MDD) from Project Requirements and Onboarding Process (PROP) sessions
Training (one remote session per 20 users, up to 4 remote sessions; screen-specific customized user manuals)
Online User Manual for the System
benefits_tech_systems.hosting_security_retention: Hosting: Microsoft Azure platform and data centers, with industry-standard security protocols and ciphers. Connectivity via secure VPN from Customer's network. Backup: nightly encrypted file- and database-level backups via Azure Recovery Services Vault; AES-256 storage area network (SAN) at rest. Customer-defined data retention policy (provided within 45 days of contract start); default if absent is 30 days post-termination destruction. Security incident reporting to ISO@PonderaSolutions.com within 72 hours of unauthorized use/disclosure.

SNAP is a federal nutrition program administered by the Department of Transitional Assistance (DTA) for Massachusetts residents.
Commonwealth of Massachusetts / Executive Office of Health and Human Services / Department of Transitional Assistance

Two independent deep-research passes returned NOT FOUND for any separately-named sub-agency responsible for SNAP eligibility within DTA. SNAP eligibility appears to sit inside DTA without a separately-named division.
